howItWorks.intro: This torque wrench setting calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Corrected Torque
rules.explanation: Adjust the dial to compensate for the increased lever arm.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Yes, adding a crow foot or extension changes the effective lever arm, requiring a corrected dial setting.

faq.q: When do I need to adjust?
faq.a: Only when the extension adds length at an angle to the torque wrench handle.
